name: Superpowers
description: A large, battle-tested framework of skills and subagents for planning, TDD, debugging, and disciplined execution. One of the most popular community skill packs; accepted into the official marketplace.

name: Office documents (pdf / docx / pptx / xlsx)
description: Anthropic's official document skills: read and author real PDF, Word, PowerPoint, and Excel files — tables of contents, letterheads, charts, data merges. Ships in the official marketplace.

install.note: Bundled with Claude Code as the pdf / docx / pptx / xlsx skills, and available in the official Anthropic skills marketplace. No install needed in most setups — just ask Claude to work with the file.

name: /code-review
description: Built-in review of your working diff for correctness bugs and cleanup opportunities at a chosen effort level. Use before every push.

install.note: Ships with Claude Code. Run /code-review on your current changes.

name: /security-review
description: Built-in security review of pending changes on the current branch — flags injection, authz gaps, secret handling, and unsafe patterns.

install.note: Ships with Claude Code. Run /security-review before merging.

name: /init (CLAUDE.md)
description: Built-in codebase scan that writes a CLAUDE.md capturing build/test commands and conventions, so every future session starts already knowing your project.

install.note: Ships with Claude Code. Run /init once per repo, then refine the generated file.

name: Skill Creator
description: Anthropic's meta-skill for authoring, editing, and eval-testing your own skills — the fastest way to turn a repeated prompt into a reusable /command.

install.note: Available in the official Anthropic skills marketplace as skill-creator.

name: Exa (deep research)
description: Official Exa plugin — web search, deep research, academic papers, and structured content extraction with citations.

name: Tavily (search & research)
description: Official Tavily plugin — real-time web search, extract, crawl, and research APIs for literature and competitive scans.

name: awesome-claude-code (discovery list)
description: The canonical hand-curated index when you want to browse beyond this loadout. Treat it as a discovery list, not an install list.
